ab: bawki, mekalingun ti iku mazas tu bilu, qanengi isu paliway timaiku?
ch: W:bawki，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎？
en: bawki, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: mai iku qaya, zani api ay zau.
en: I don’t have one either. This is api’s.

ab: nayau si, qanengi paliway timaiku? kikiya ma, antangi patadikudan ku ti.
ch: W:那可以借我一下子嗎？我很快就還你。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: kua! ala ika!
en: Sure, take it.

ab: wanay, paqayaw iku qaya muwanay ti apian.
en: Thank you and thank apian for me.

ab: niana ngidan su?
en: May I help you?

ab: ngid iku patadikud tu uzusa sudad zau.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: kua, yau pama niana ngidan su?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: liway pa iku tu utulu sudad zau.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: pun ti. utulu ti deddanan, patadikud ika!
ch: A:好了。記得三天後要拿來還！
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: mai pama isu patadikud tu sasupasan ku.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: patadikudan ku ti siRab.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: nazau si, manna meqamai ti sasupasan ku?
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了？
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: ussa paliwayan su ti ti bawkian?
en: Did you lend it to bawki?

ab: itta! ipil aka aizipna si!
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: paliway aka sasupasan ku timaisu.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: api, nipaliwayan ni bawki timaisu gaytu zau?
en: api, did bawki lend you this coat?

ab: ussa, niRasan na tina ku zau.
ch: W:不是，這是我媽媽買給我的。
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: sasetaR tu zasu gaytu ni bawki.
en: bawki’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: tengen ay gaytu na, mai sasetaR tamak niaq.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: api, umeliway isu tu kelisiw ni bawki?
en: api, did you borrow money from bawki?

ab: yau, maw mengid iku patadikud timaizipana, wanayka mekalingun ti iku mazas tu kelisiw.
ch: W:有，我本來今天要還他，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: nayau si, qumni isu patadikud?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: temawaR patadikud aka timaizipana.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: kua, paqayaw aka aisu semanu ti bawkian.
en: Okay, I will tell bawki for you.
